{{CargoRelic
|name=Dimensional Wanted Order S-7
|class_id=20868
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=The Demon God's apostles occupy space-time gaps, Earth's will issues this wanted order to encourage travelers to go all out to eliminate the apostles! -- Earth's Will (Seal)
|fame=15
|art=14
|fth=16
|civ=15
|tech=30
|ss1=Per 2 Time II Apostles dominated, Snail HP +10<br>Per 2 Time II Apostles dominated, Snail DEF +1<br>Time Rift II Apostles dominated:80/80
|ss2=Per 2 Time II Apostles dominated, Snail HP +20<br>Per 2 Time II Apostles dominated, Snail DEF +2<br>Time Rift II Apostles dominated:80/80
|ss3=Per 2 Time II Apostles dominated, Snail HP +30<br>Per 2 Time II Apostles dominated, Snail DEF +3<br>Time Rift II Apostles dominated:80/80
|ss4=Per 2 Time II Apostles dominated, Snail HP +30<br>Per 2 Time II Apostles dominated, Snail DEF +3<br>Time Rift II Apostles dominated:80/80
|ss7=Per 2 Time II Apostles dominated, Snail HP +30<br>Per 2 Time II Apostles dominated, Snail DEF +3<br>Time Rift II Apostles dominated:80/80<br> (Awakened)
}}
